subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Self-Subsisting Lord Who, through His Most Exalted Word, bestowed existence upon the realm of creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت قیومی را لایق و سزا است که بکلمه علیا ناسوت انشا را هستی بخشید و از
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
